# Variables from include files expanded in recipes
mk -p 1 -n -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
# Variable extracmdarg and deps are set in include.
# Test if extracmdarg is set for recipes
<./deps

test3.mk.o: $deps
	secondprocess ab

one:
	process bar $extracmdarg

two:
	$extracmdarg rebar
-- deps --
deps = one two
extracmdarg = gopher
-- expected --
one: process bar gopher
two: gopher rebar
test3.mk.o: secondprocess ab
